generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. Remember when that critical infrastructure was hacked last year? We can't afford to wait for another crisis. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about protecting our communities. #SecureOurFuture
